details.test: Task 1: purchase cheapest 3-day pass with workshop access under $700
Task 2: build agenda with keynote and AI track session
Task 3: add evening networking events with free refreshments on Day 1
Task 4: choose most advanced short workshop-like session under $300
Task 5: bookmark Gold AI exhibitors and book demos
Task 6: save nearby hotel under $220 with breakfast included
Task 7: add short UX on-demand sessions from previous year to watchlist
Task 8: schedule 20-minute meetings with UX designers / attendees
